body_html:
Hi Hugo,

I went back through our 31-minute call because I wanted to understand what still needs to click before this moves forward.
It still feels like the real question is not whether this matters to you, but what would make the next step feel clear enough to move on.

Are you still trying to figure out whether the food and service fit what you have in mind, or would it make more sense for us to get on a quick phone call and clear it up directly?

If a call is the easier move, I can make time at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, or 1:00 PM.
If tasting helps more than more back-and-forth, I can also save you a spot for Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM.

Andre

Regards,

Andre Raw
Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website
